repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: International Congress on the History of Sciences records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: International Congress on the History of Sciences

did.physdesc: Correspondence, abstracts, papers, periodicals, mailing lists, bulletins, minutes, memoranda, reports, tape recordings, and other material.
did.abstract: Correspondence relating to the planning, financing, and publicity for the Congress held at Ithaca, New York, and Philadelphia in August and September, 1962.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence relating to the planning, financing, and publicity for the Congress held at Ithaca, New York, and Philadelphia in August and September, 1962; also includes lists of participants, copies of abstracts and papers presented with commentaries, periodicals, and mailing lists; also, drafts and final copies of the Congress' bulletins, minutes and memoranda of the planning and local arrangement committees, reports, and other material. Also, tape recordings of the proceedings. Henry Guerlac was the president of the Congress, Richard Shryock chaired the Philadelphia operations.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: International Congress of the History of Science records, #14-17-744. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Congresses and conventions -- Pennsylvania -- Philadelphia.
Congresses and conventions -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
Science -- History.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.
